_surface_note: How aggressively strudel locks the agent's tool surface each turn. 'pragmatic' (default): read/write/edit/bash + strudel_search stay active; everything else (skills, MCP tools, specialized tools) is discovered via the gateway. 'strict': only read + strudel_search. Or set "baseline": ["read","grep","ls"] to tune the always-on set exactly.

embeddings._comment: Optional (L1). Omit this whole block for zero-infra lexical search. OpenAI-compatible: works with a local server, a hosted endpoint, or any provider via apiKey.
